message:
test(metaballs, minimap, capability-override, plasma): add 43 unit tests

Coverage improvements across four modules:
- metaballs.rs: 16 tests for lerp_color, gradient_color, ping_pong edge cases,
  MetaballsFx API, ball_count_for_quality, palette stops, preset constructors
- mermaid_minimap.rs: 8 tests for corner placement variants, config defaults,
  total_size, is_trivial, layout_to_px zero bounds, viewport rendering
- capability_override.rs: 9 tests for full dumb/modern/tmux field coverage,
  builder methods, apply_to mux/input features, stack composition, clone
- plasma.rs: 10 tests for remaining factory methods, name(), default palette,
  galaxy/cyberpunk rendering, monochrome endpoints, hsv green/blue, wave_low

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
